entities.name: 能力过剩 (capability overhang)
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为行业面临的最大问题之一，即 AI 模型能力提升得太快，导致产品端和用户认知完全跟不上、无法消化新能力的现象。

evidence.quote: Now, zooming out, I feel like one of the biggest problems in the industry is capability overhang where the models are just getting better so quickly.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 冷启动 (cold start)
entities.how_described: 本集将其描述为 AI 产品中的重大挑战，增长团队试图通过从 ChatGPT 导入记忆等功能来改善冷启动问题和新用户体验。

evidence.quote: We're just thinking about what can we do to improve the cold start problem and improve the new user experience.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 正确的摩擦 (right friction)
entities.how_described: 本集提到的一个反直觉增长心法：在用户注册流程中增加合理的摩擦（如多问几个关于身份和兴趣的问题），有助于帮用户理解产品价值，从而带来更高的转化和留存。

evidence.quote: And I think that one learning, seeing this time and time again across companies, actually the right friction helps and adding more friction usually works if you do it the right way.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 成功灾难 (success disasters)

evidence.quote: I think then probably the big differences is I would say that roughly 70% of what I spend my time on is what we internally refer to as success disasters.

evidence.quote: But that's 70% of my time, I'd say, is just these firefighting of success disasters.

entities.name: 公益公司 (public benefit corporation)

evidence.quote: We then created a public benefit corporation, PBC, which allows you to legally say that maximizing shareholder value is not the overarching umbrella goal of this company and you can optimize for public benefits.
